repair_plan.repaired_text_preview:
script_interface
   debug
end_script_interface

radar_signature JAMMER_SIGNATURE
   constant 10 m^2
end_radar_signature

radar_signature RADAR_SITE_SIGNATURE
   constant 100 m^2
end_radar_signature

antenna_pattern SEARCH_ANTENNA
   constant_pattern
      peak_gain 30 dB
      azimuth_beamwidth 3 deg
      elevation_beamwidth 3 deg
   end_constant_pattern
end_antenna_pattern

electronic_warfare JAMMER_EA WSF_ELECTRONIC_ATTACK
   technique noise_jamming WSF_EA_TECHNIQUE
      mitigation_class_name noise_jamming
      effect power_effect WSF_POWER_EFFECT
         jamming_delta_gain 0.0001 db
      end_effect
   end_technique
end_electronic_warfare

platform_type GROUND_RADAR_SITE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_GROUND_MOVER
      maximum_speed 0 m/sec
      minimum_speed 0 m/sec
   end_mover
   sensor search_radar WSF_RADAR_SENSOR
      frame_time 2 sec
      minimum_range 0 nm
      maximum_range 150 nm
      reports_location
      reports_range
      reports_bearing
      transmitter
         antenna_pattern SEARCH_ANTENNA
         power 500 kw
         pulse_width 2.0e-6 sec
         pulse_repetition_frequency 400 hz
         frequency 9500 mhz
      end_transmitter
      receiver
         antenna_pattern SEARCH_ANTENNA
         bandwidth 1 mhz
      end_receiver
   end_sensor
   radar_signature RADAR_SITE_SIGNATURE
end_platform_type

platform_type JAMMER_PLATFORM WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_AIR_MOVER
      maximum_speed 250 m/sec
      minimum_speed 60 m/sec
   end_mover
   electronic_warfare JAMMER_EA
   radar_signature JAMMER_SIGNATURE
end_platform_type

platform red_radar_station GROUND_RADAR_SITE
   side red
   route
      position 32.00n 118.80e speed 0 m/sec
   end_route
   sensor search_radar
      on
   end_sensor
end_platform

platform blue_jammer JAMMER_PLATFORM
   side blue
   route
      position 31.80n 118.60e altitude 8000 m msl speed 200 m/sec
      position 32.10n 118.90e altitude 8000 m msl speed 200 m/sec
      repeat
   end_route
end_platform

event_pipe
   file output/spot_jamming_demo.aer
end_event_pipe

end_time 600 sec
